name: chaos-gomoku-3d
description: CHAOS GOMOKU 3D — five-in-a-row with chaos skills on a real Three.js board.

scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.rmSync('dist',{recursive:true,force:true});fs.cpSync('web-app','dist',{recursive:true});console.log('Built static app -> dist/ ('+fs.readdirSync('dist').length+' top-level entries)')"
